---
name: New connector request
about: Propose a new external tool to wire into DreamerOS
title: "connector: <tool name>"
labels: connector
---

**Tool**
Name and homepage of the tool.

**Category**
One of: ai_tools, infrastructure, work, memory_sources, commerce, creative,
social_media.

**Auth mode**
One of: mcp_client, paste_token, oauth, api_key.

**What it should do (ifp_rules, plain English)**
What it reads, what it can write, and what should stay gated behind approval.

**Are you planning to open the pull request yourself?**
Yes / No.
